info.title: VoltIQ
info.description: VoltIQ is an enterprise-grade AI-powered fleet electrification and asset intelligence platform.

get.description:
Get a summary of the electrification readiness status of the entire fleet,
dynamically calculated from the fleet_readiness dataset, along with sample recommendations.
Get detailed EV replacement feasibility for a specific fleet vehicle.

post.description:
Predict EV readiness score and transition category for any vehicle given its
mechanical and operational telemetry.

Predict State of Health (SOH) and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of an EV battery
based on incoming cell telemetry metrics (Voltage, Cycle Number, Temp, Capacity).
Predict Remaining Useful Life (RUL) only, using State of Health as input feature.

get.description:
Lookup a battery by ID in the database/dataset, extract the latest cycle telemetry,
and predict SOH and RUL.

Fetch cumulative carbon emissions, simulated EV offset projections,
and fleet progress toward net-zero targets from fleet carbon data.

post.description:
Perform a comparative carbon emissions analysis for a specific vehicle (baseline vs EV scenario)
over a custom annual distance and fuel type.

Query the AI Fleet Advisor to get insights about battery telemetry, 
readiness schedules, or carbon calculations.

get.description:
Detailed system health status including uptime, ML model load state,
and dataset availability diagnostics.

Get backend version, environment variables, operating system platform,
and Python engine configurations.

Fetch the list of all registered models, their metadata, feature schemas,
and latest performance evaluation metrics.
Fetch extensive metadata, training parameters, and metrics for a specific model ID.
Health check endpoint for container probes and status monitoring.
